headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(self), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com data:; connect-src 'self' https://wa.me https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://wa.me; upgrade-insecure-requests
